title: striga aspera
intro: Striga aspera, also known as the Rough Witchweed or Rough Striga, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Striga aspera include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Striga aspera can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or as a topical application.
